38:5.arabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْـَٔالِهَةَ إِلَـٰهًا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
38:5.english: Has he made the gods into one God? This is truly an astonishing thing!
38:5.score_notes: Quraysh mocking 'One God?!' — dramatic, both singular and plural in one verse.

lesson_use.arabic: أَجَعَلَ الآلِهَةَ إِلَٰهًا وَاحِدًا إِنَّ هَذَا لَشَيْءٌ عُجَابٌ
lesson_use.english: Has he made all the gods into one God?! This is astonishing!
lesson_use.notes: Quraysh mocking the Prophet. Both singular (ilah) and plural (aliha) in one phrase. Dramatic recall of L1 forms.
